title: Practice Admin Action Node List + Create Scaffold
goal: Add a minimal /practice/admin scaffold that lists and creates practice_action_nodes for the selected menu so blank menus with locations can author the first runnable node without touching runtime/store/session helper boundaries.
constraints: Keep menuView.ts, sessionView.ts, runtime.ts, practiceStore.ts, and types/practice.ts untouched unless a concrete blocker is proven from code

Encapsulate the two-table insert inside src/lib/practice/queries.ts by creating a parent practice_recipe_nodes row with node_type='action' and a child practice_action_nodes row; do not add page-level Supabase calls
Limit this slice to action node list/create only; defer ingredient nodes, step-group create/link/edit, node delete/edit, and tacit/media authoring
Use existing practice_locations from the selected menu as the only location source; if the menu has zero locations, block create with a clear UI hint
Do not enforce unique step_no; validate only required positive step_no, action_type, and location_id, with duration_sec optional
Treat docs/worker/LAST_SESSION.md, docs/worker/LEARNINGS.md, and docs/worker/MISTAKES.md as allowed auxiliary files when the updates are task-related, per CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md
Judge extra_changes against the fresh session-start git status baseline captured on 2026-04-19
acceptance: Selected menu on /practice/admin shows existing action nodes in stable step_no order even when the menu has no step groups
Admins can create an action node with step_no, action_type, location_id, and optional duration_sec for the selected menu

A pure adminView helper derives the admin action-node list from PracticeMenuBundle.action_nodes plus locations without React, Zustand, or Supabase imports, and targeted vitest coverage exists for its ordering and label resolution
After successful create, the admin action-node list and existing summary counts stay in sync without breaking menu metadata edit, menu create, location create, or step-group drilldown behavior
PracticeMenuPage, PracticeSessionPage, and engine/runtime/store boundaries remain behaviorally unchanged; the new node flows through the existing fetchPracticeMenuBundle read path
Phase 4 completes in the required order: build -> lint -> self-reviewer -> tsc, allowing only the documented pre-existing useGameTick lint warning and pre-existing Vite chunk-size warning
